kpis.name: Goals per box touch
kpis.description: Number of non-penalty goals compared to the number of penalty area touches.

kpis.name: xG
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty expected goals adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: xG per box touch
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty xG compared to the number of penalty area touches.

kpis.name: xG per shot
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty xG compared to the number of shots.
